new_example: The company was fined heavily for the illegality of its practices today.
new_translation: Công ty đã bị phạt nặng vì tính bất hợp pháp của các hoạt động.

old_example: He had to take a week off from work due to a sudden illness that required bed rest and medication.
new_example: He had to take a week off from work due to illness.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã phải nghỉ làm một tuần do bị bệnh.

old_example: A series of colorful floodlights were used to illuminate the historic building at night.
new_example: Colorful floodlights were used to illuminate the historic building today.
new_translation: Đèn pha đầy màu sắc được dùng chiếu sáng tòa nhà lịch sử.

old_example: The children's book features beautiful drawings by a famous illustrator who is known for her vibrant and imaginative style.
new_example: The children's book features beautiful drawings by a famous illustrator today.
new_translation: Cuốn sách thiếu nhi có những bức vẽ đẹp của họa sĩ nổi tiếng.

old_example: The university is proud of its illustrious alumni who have won several Nobel Prizes.
new_example: The university is proud of its illustrious alumni today.
new_translation: Trường đại học tự hào về những cựu sinh viên lừng lẫy hôm nay.

old_example: The young author's vivid imagination allowed her to create a fascinating and believable fantasy world for her readers.
new_example: The author's vivid imagination allowed her to create a fascinating world.
new_translation: Trí tưởng tượng sống động giúp tác giả tạo ra thế giới lôi cuốn.

old_example: The architect's imaginative design for the new library incorporates elements of both traditional and modern styles.
new_example: The architect's imaginative design for the library incorporates modern styles today.
new_translation: Thiết kế sáng tạo của kiến trúc sư cho thư viện mang phong cách hiện đại.
